_comment: Example style profile — copy this file and customize for each client.
tone: friendly and direct — like a neighbor who happens to know marketing
voice: conversational, first-person, warm but not sycophantic
sentence_length: short to medium — max 2 clauses per sentence
cta_style: single soft CTA — ask for a 15-minute call, not a demo or purchase
avoid: I hope this email finds you well
at the end of the day
bullet point lists in the email body
sender_persona: a growth consultant who works with professional service firms — dental practices, law firms, financial advisors, and specialist contractors
service_description: done-for-you cold email outreach that books discovery calls with qualified prospects every month
pain_point: most professional service firms rely almost entirely on referrals — which is great until the pipeline dries up
cta_text: Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week to see if it's a fit?
